_doc: Cohort bundles (stabilization step 5, 2026-07-10) — THE machine-readable version of the
/eval-vlm cohort table. Consumers: eval_all.sh --cohort/COHORT= (expands to all VO_* env
vars; explicit VO_* overrides win), run cards (expected_n), and — future — the compiler's
floors. Add a new cohort HERE (all fields) before any eval references it; eval_all
hard-fails on an unknown cohort instead of guessing GT (the reasoner_sweep P2.2 rule).
n = FULL test-split rep count (per-run subsets like the gtobsbuild build's 2157 are
recorded per-run in the card, not here).

1105.note: SUPERSEDED bank — use only for deliberate comparison against historical 1105 rows.

1806.note: CURRENT cohort (2906 schema). Path re-confirmed by Sandra 2026-07-10 after the morning's pmartins reorganization scare.
